description: A powerful CLI tool that transforms any piece of content into 8+ platform-optimized formats. Takes blog posts, articles, or notes and generates Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, email newsletters, short video scripts, Reddit posts, Instagram captions, podcast scripts, and blog summaries — all with proper formatting, structure, and engagement hooks.
features: 8+ repurposing formats: Twitter/X Thread, LinkedIn Post, Email Newsletter, Short Video Script, Reddit Post, Instagram Caption, Podcast Script, Blog Summary
Hook-first methodology with 10 hook templates per format
Platform-specific formatting (character limits, hashtags, emoji density)
Batch processing for multiple input files
Interactive mode for quick single-content repurposing
JSON export for integration with publishing tools
Demo mode with sample content for testing
Zero external dependencies — pure Python standard library
target_audience: Content creators and marketers repurposing content
AI automation agency owners doing content marketing
SaaS founders building personal brand across platforms
monetization_paths: AI Revenue Toolkit bundle inclusion at $37
Free limited version as email capture lead magnet
